rows.label: tlk43100143_05_msg0001
rows.name:
I heard from a mercenary
who fled here that Dad
is alive in Temperantia!!

rows.label: tlk43100143_05_msg0002
rows.name:
He got stuck dealing
with things in Temperantia!

rows.label: tlk43100143_05_msg0003
rows.name:
He could've at least
sent me word! Geez,
Dad, you're awful!

rows.label: tlk43100143_05_msg0004
rows.name:
I'll keep waiting here
until Dad comes back
to the city.

rows.label: tlk43100143_05_msg0005
rows.name:
When he comes back, he
promised to teach me the
sword. He'd better!
